meta.notes: First claudecode run with claude-sonnet-4-6. Whisper model already cached. Faster download (91ms) suggests S3 CDN cache warm.

task.name: video-captions
task.purpose: Add TikTok-style word-highlight captions to a 67.8s English vlog video using faster-whisper (small, CPU)
task.expected_output: Captioned mp4 with tiktok-style word highlights burned in

install.notes: No install step — skill pre-installed at ~/code/nova3-agent-skills/video-captions/

asset_acquisition.notes: curl from S3 us-east-1 to devbox; 91ms, likely CDN cache warm

steps.name: extract_audio
steps.notes: Standalone ffmpeg -vn -ar 16000 -ac 1 -f mp3; also runs internally within caption script

steps.name: transcribe_faster_whisper
steps.notes: Standalone faster-whisper small CPU int8; 138 words, language=en; model cached from prior run

steps.name: caption_script_full
steps.notes: Full caption_video.py --style tiktok; includes audio extraction + transcription + ass generation + ffmpeg burn

execution.notes: execution.total_s = probe + extract_audio + transcribe + caption_script_full (0.010+0.394+21.334+32.048). Output: 30720 KB.

delivery.notes: No upload — local delivery only (Claude Code benchmark)

tokens._note: Nulled: extract-cc-tokens.py reported session-cumulative totals, not per-task usage. Token data included other tasks from the same Claude Code session.

cost._note: Nulled: derived from unreliable session-cumulative token counts.
